options.name: -addPortAsNeeded
options.description: Determines whether to add hierarchical module ports during buffering. It only works for manual ECO commands.

options.name: -delayCalcEffort
options.description: Delay calculation effort level { low | medium | high } used in timing update

options.name: -honorDontTouch
options.description: Check dont_touch on instances, cells and nets

options.name: -honorPowerIntent
options.description: Perform MSV checks during ECO: Do not allow resize of regular cell with always-on cell (and vice-versa), do not change cells belonging to different power domains, do not allow adding buffer to a power domain it doesn't belong to, do not buffer a cross power domain net, do not allow deletion of an always-on buffer, a level-shifter, or a buffer which will cause redundant isolation cell.

options.name: -inheritNetAttr
options.description: New net inherits attributes of buffered net

options.name: -modifyOnlyLayers
options.description: Modify routes only on metal layers in this range (both inclusive)

options.name: -prefixName
options.description: Prefix name to be used by ECO commands

options.name: -preserveModuleFunction
options.description: Determines whether to preserve logical functions at hierarchical module ports. It only works for manual ECO commands.

options.name: -quiet
options.description: Displays the current settings in Tcl list format only

options.name: -nonDefault
options.description: Displays the current settings which are not default settings
